case_title: WOLF, AXEL VS HOOPER, BRIAN C.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $260.00 FILED BY WOLF, AXEL AS TO DEFENDANT HOOPER, BRIAN C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLF, AXEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOOPER, BRIAN C. $260.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HOOPER, BRIAN C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOOPER, BRIAN C.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-08-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-21-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
